# Demaciains Research Services
> 9 pay-per-use API endpoints for AI agents and humans. Fresh dynamic data on every request. USDC on Base via x402 protocol.

## API
Base URL: https://drgalio.github.io/demaciains-paywall
Engine: Demaciains Dynamic Data Engine v3.4 — Client-Side Seeded PRNG

## Endpoints

### Market Intelligence
- GET /api/market-gap — $1.00 USDC — Structured market gap report identifying underserved digital markets with evidence, search volume estimates, and build complexity ratings.
- GET /api/trends — $0.25 USDC — Top 5 trending pain points from Reddit, Hacker News, and Product Hunt. Updated hourly.
- GET /api/competitor-gap?niche=... — $0.50 USDC — Competitor gap analysis for any product niche.
- GET /api/algo-report?market=... — $2.00 USDC — Backtested pattern analysis on market signals or datasets.

### Startup & Product
- GET /api/startup-validator?idea=... — $1.50 USDC — Multi-dimensional startup idea validation: 8-factor scoring, market sizing, risk matrix.
- GET /api/pricing-strategy?product=... — $0.75 USDC — Dynamic pricing optimization: conversion benchmarks, pricing psychology, A/B test plans.
- GET /api/revenue-forecast?product=...&price=...&traffic=... — $1.25 USDC — 4-scenario revenue projection, monthly trajectory, growth levers, risk analysis.

### Strategy & Growth
- GET /api/go-to-market?product=...&niche=...&price=... — $1.50 USDC — Complete go-to-market strategy: positioning, channel prioritization, 4-phase launch plan.
- GET /api/content-strategy?product=...&niche=...&audience=... — $1.50 USDC — Content strategy: topic clusters, SEO keywords, platform plans, 4-week calendar, distribution playbook.

### Free
- GET / — Homepage + product catalog
- GET /api/ — Interactive API explorer
- GET /.well-known/agent.json — Agent discovery card

## Payment
Protocol: x402 (https://x402.org)
Network: Base (eip155:8453)
Asset: USDC (0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913)
Wallet: 0x83F31CE0F8b1f27a6Ad91693709febb728c71563
